file: 1119_Niu 等 - 2022 - Highly dispersed platinum clusters anchored on hollow ZSM-5 zeolite for deep hydrogenation of polycy.txt

experiments.description: 在连续下流式管式固定床反应器中，使用各种制备的Pt催化剂对多环芳烃（萘、苊烯、菲和芴）进行深度加氢反应评估。反应在180-280°C、4.0 MPa压力下进行，使用十氢化萘中的1.0 wt%反应物溶液，重时空速(WHSV)为16.2 h⁻¹，氢油比为500 NmL·mL⁻¹。
experiments.text_snippet: Naphthalene, acenaphthylene, phenanthrene and fluorene were selected as model compounds to estimate the deep hydrogenation performances of as-prepared catalysts in a down-flow fixed-bed reactor, and the phenanthrene hydrogenation was investigated in detail... The feedstock of 1.0 wt% phenanthrene in decalin was pumped into the reactor via using a plunger pump with a weight hourly space velocity (WHSV) of 16.2 h⁻¹ and a H2/oil of 500 NmL·mL⁻¹.

Conversion rate.original: Phenanthrene conversion: 88.5% at 180°C, 100% at 220°C over Pt/HZ-SEA

Product Selectivity.original: Almost 100% selectivity to deep hydrogenation products (DHPS) at 220°C over Pt/HZ-SEA

Catalyst stability.original: Excellent sulfur resistance observed with 600 ppm dibenzothiophene (DBT) for 35 h; DBT conversion stable at ~71% after initial decline
